english_text: The soup is spicy and hot
This is crunchy on the outside
The flavor is deep and complex
The broth is clear and light
It is a bit too salty
The fish is grilled to perfection
It has the perfect amount of garlic
This tastes like my mom's cooking
The tteokbokki is chewy and spicy
This has a hint of sesame oil
The pork belly is fatty and delicious
The pancake is crispy outside and soft inside
This has the right amount of sweetness
The green onion adds a nice touch
The cheese is gooey and stretchy
The spice level is just right
The grilled meat has great char marks
Each bite is bursting with flavor
korean_text: 한 입 한 입 맛이 가득해
romanization: han ip han ip masi gadeukae

korean_text: 이 식당은 절대 실망 안 해
romanization: i sikdangeun jeoldae silmang an hae

english_text: I could eat this every day
This is the best food I have ever had
